summary: Add a TokenBucket rate limiter helper
description: Several endpoints want IP-based rate limiting. Implement a small `TokenBucket(capacity, refill_per_second)` class with an `allow(key)` method. Pure Python, no I/O, no clock injection needed — accept an optional `now` callable for testing.
acceptance_criteria: `TokenBucket(capacity=N, refill_per_second=R).allow(key)` returns True for the first N calls per key, then False until refill
A test injects a fake `now` so the test is deterministic and does not sleep

comments.author: carol@example.com
comments.body: Make `allow()` thread-safety out of scope for v1; we'll add a Lock in a follow-up PR.

comments.author: dan@example.com
comments.body: Please use the project's existing `unittest` style — no pytest yet.
